3200810.name: GENERAL IDLER
3200810.description:
Only a madman would dream of conquering the entire world… Are you that madman?

GENERAL IDLER is an addictive idle strategy game where you grow a powerful military force and take over the globe, one country at a time. Begin with humble beginnings and carefully plan your attacks based on geography — you can only invade countries that share a border with your current territory.

Every country presents a unique challenge based on its population, area, and defense rating, requiring smart choices in unit upgrades, tech research, and resource management. As you progress, unlock advanced military units, automated systems, and passive income generators that push your campaign forward — even while you're away.

Whether you’re a casual strategist or an idle game veteran, GENERAL IDLER offers satisfying progression, geopolitical planning, and explosive expansion across the world map.

Key Features:

  • Conquer Strategically: Only attack neighboring nations. Choose your path based on population, area, and defense.

  • Build & Upgrade: Train a growing army, unlock new unit types, and boost your military tech tree.

  • Idle Progression: Earn rewards and expand your empire even when offline.

  • Deep Yet Simple: Easy to pick up with layers of tactical decision-making.

  • Global Domination: Watch your influence spread across the world map in real time.

Will your name be feared across the globe?
Command. Conquer. Idle. Repeat.
